title: Freyera bornmuelleri
taxonomy: Freyera bornmuelleri is classified within the family Gesneriaceae. This family belongs to the order Lamiales. The order Lamiales is a part of the clade Asterids. The clade Asterids is a subclade of the clade Angiosperms, which is a subgroup of the larger plant clade called Embryophyta. The Embryophyta is a subgroup of the clade Archaeplastida.
